mapper.sql: id, dict_type dictType, dict_code dictCode, dict_name dictName, dict_value dictValue, sort_no sortNo, status, remark, create_date createDate, update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_data_dictionary
or dict_type like concat('%', #{dictType}, '%')
or dict_code like concat('%', #{dictCode}, '%')
or dict_name like concat('%', #{dictName}, '%')
order by dict_type asc, sort_no asc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into t_data_dictionary (dict_type, dict_code, dict_name, dict_value, sort_no, status, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{dictType}, #{dictCode}, #{dictName}, #{dictValue}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_data_dictionary set dict_type = #{dictType}, dict_code = #{dictCode}, dict_name = #{dictName}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
